verdict.label: Marginal
verdict.headline: Lagide Lunch
verdict.reason: There is a possible lunch window at Lagide, but the sources are not strong enough for a confident call.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Lagide looks like a fun-sized window for progression, medium confidence: 0.6-1.1 m, 101 kJ, 8 s period, consistent 79/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Expect: it can get busy, and it is usually more flow than heavy barrel.
best.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · label progression, medium confidence · 0.6-1.1 m · 101 kJ · 8 s period · wind is not fully clear.

ranked.explanation: Meio da Baia looks like a clean fun-sized window for check first, medium confidence: 0.6-1.1 m, 111 kJ, 8 s period, consistent 79/100, and good wind at 15 km/h.  An inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay; this is best for bodyboard sessions when the bay is clean, there is enough period and size, and the forecast shows a defined wave.  Expect: it is less reliable than the main bay spots, so weak swell or short period can make it feel soft.
ranked.shortExplanation: Meio da Baia is an inconsistent Baía spot that can work well when north-northwest swell reaches the bay · label check first, medium confidence · 0.6-1.1 m · 111 kJ · 8 s period · good wind at 15 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Cerro looks like a clean fun-sized window for check first, medium confidence: 0.6-1.1 m, 84 kJ, 8 s period, consistent 76/100, and good wind at 15 km/h.  A sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent; this is best for manageable bodyboard waves when north-northwest swell reaches the bay with clean southerly wind.  Watch: Cerro may feel too soft without more push.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cerro is a sheltered beachbreak with gentle lefts and rights, somewhat similar to Cantinho but less consistent · label check first, medium confidence · 0.6-1.1 m · 84 kJ · 8 s period · good wind at 15 km/h · Watch: Cerro may feel too soft without more push.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a clean fun-sized window for advanced/heavy, medium confidence: 0.6-1.1 m, 84 kJ, 15 s period, workable consistency 48/100, and good wind at 20 km/h.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered.  Watch: exposed north spot needs Lagide to be under 1 m; Almagreira has a heavier bodyboard risk signal.
ranked.shortExplanation: Almagreira is an exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal · label advanced/heavy, medium confidence · 0.6-1.1 m · 84 kJ · 15 s period · good wind at 20 km/h · Watch: exposed north spot needs Lagide to be under 1 m; Almagreira has a heavier bodyboard risk signal.
